column1: She was full of new ideas and could share them with anyone who didn’t have …. .
Let’s go out! The rain is not … for us to stay indoors.
I’d like to buy a car, but I haven’t got _________at the moment.
Have you got _________ in your coffee or would you like some more?
Are you ___________? Or shall I switch on the heating?
It’s only a small car. There isn’t __________for all of us.
Steve didn’t feel __________to go to work this morning.
I enjoyed my trip to Paris, but there wasn’t _______to do everything I wanted.
The wallet was __________ to put in my pocket.
